description: A one-year, Monday-Friday Bible reading plan that follows the storyline of Scripture to see how God's redemptive story unfolds—from creation, to Israel, to Jesus, to the church, and finally to the New Creation.

Week 1 - Creation and God's Design

Memory Verse: [Genesis 1:27] So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him; male and female he created them.

Christ Connection: Jesus is the perfect image of God who restores in us what was broken in creation.
